name: Budget Tracker
html:
💰 Budget Tracker

Solde Actuel
$0.00
Revenus $0.00
Dépenses $0.00
css: :host { --budget-bg: #1e293b; --budget-card-bg: #0f172a; --budget-accent: #3b82f6; --budget-radius: 16px; --budget-padding: 1.25rem; --budget-font-size: 0.85rem; display: flex; flex-direction: column; width: 100%; height: 100%; box-sizing: border-box; font-family: system-ui; color: white; } * { box-sizing: border-box; } .budget-container { background: var(--budget-bg); border-radius: var(--budget-radius); padding: var(--budget-padding); box-shadow: 0 4px 6px rgba(0,0,0,0.1); width: 100%; height: 100%; display: flex; flex-direction: column; overflow: hidden; } .widget-title { margin: 0 0 1rem 0; font-size: var(--budget-font-size); font-weight: 600; color: #94a3b8; text-transform: uppercase; text-align: center; } .balance-card { background: var(--budget-card-bg); border-radius: 12px; padding: 1rem; text-align: center; margin-bottom: 1rem; flex-shrink: 0; } .balance-label { font-size: 0.7rem; color: #94a3b8; text-transform: uppercase; margin-bottom: 4px; } .balance-value { font-size: 2rem; font-weight: 800; color: var(--budget-accent); margin-bottom: 1rem; } .balance-value.negative { color: #ef4444; } .balance-stats { display: flex; justify-content: space-around; padding-top: 0.75rem; border-top: 1px solid #334155; } .stat-item { display: flex; flex-direction: column; } .stat-label { font-size: 0.6rem; color: #94a3b8; } .stat-val { font-size: 0.9rem; font-weight: 700; } .stat-item.income .stat-val { color: #22c55e; } .stat-item.expense .stat-val { color: #ef4444; } .input-section { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 8px; margin-bottom: 1rem; flex-shrink: 0; } .input-row { display: flex; gap: 8px; } .modern-input { background: var(--budget-card-bg); border: 1px solid #334155; color: white; border-radius: 8px; padding: 8px; flex: 1; min-width: 0; } .action-row { display: flex; gap: 8px; } .type-toggle { display: flex; background: var(--budget-card-bg); border-radius: 8px; padding: 2px; flex: 1; } .toggle-btn { flex: 1; background: none; border: none; color: #94a3b8; border-radius: 6px; padding: 6px; cursor: pointer; } .toggle-btn.active { background: var(--budget-bg); color: white; } .add-btn { background: var(--budget-accent); color: white; border: none; padding: 8px 16px; border-radius: 8px; cursor: pointer; font-weight: bold; } .entry-list { flex: 1; overflow-y: auto; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 6px; } .entry-item { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; background: var(--budget-card-bg); padding: 8px 12px; border-radius: 8px; align-items: center; } .entry-info { display: flex; flex-direction: column; } .entry-name { font-size: 0.85rem; font-weight: bold; } .entry-date { font-size: 0.65rem; color: #94a3b8; } .entry-right { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; } .entry-amount { font-weight: bold; } .entry-amount.income { color: #22c55e; } .entry-amount.expense { color: #ef4444; } .btn-del { background: none; border: none; color: #ef4444; cursor: pointer; font-size: 1.2rem; } .footer { text-align: center; margin-top: 8px; } .reset-btn { background: none; border: none; color: #94a3b8; text-decoration: underline; cursor: pointer; }
js:
const { root, saveState, getState } = api; let entries = []; let currentType = 'expense'; const expenseButton = root.getElementById('type-expense'); const incomeButton = root.getElementById('type-income'); function setType(type) { currentType = type; expenseButton.classList.toggle('active', type === 'expense'); incomeButton.classList.toggle('active', type === 'income'); } function render() { const list = root.getElementById('entry-list'); if (!list) return; list.innerHTML = ''; let total = 0; let income = 0; let expense = 0; entries.forEach((entry, index) => { total += entry.amount; if (entry.amount > 0) income += entry.amount; else expense += Math.abs(entry.amount); const row = document.createElement('div'); row.className = 'entry-item'; const isIncome = entry.amount > 0; row.innerHTML = `
`; row.querySelector('.entry-name').textContent = entry.name; row.querySelector('.entry-date').textContent = new Date(entry.date).toLocaleDateString('fr-FR'); row.querySelector('.entry-amount').textContent = `${isIncome ? '+' : '-'}$${Math.abs(entry.amount).toFixed(2)}`; row.querySelector('.btn-del').onclick = () => { entries.splice(index, 1); render(); saveState(entries); }; list.appendChild(row); }); const balance = root.getElementById('total-balance'); const incomeNode = root.getElementById('total-income'); const expenseNode = root.getElementById('total-expense'); if (balance) { balance.textContent = '$' + total.toFixed(2); balance.classList.toggle('negative', total < 0); } if (incomeNode) incomeNode.textContent = '$' + income.toFixed(2); if (expenseNode) expenseNode.textContent = '$' + expense.toFixed(2); } expenseButton.onclick = () => setType('expense'); incomeButton.onclick = () => setType('income'); root.getElementById('btn-add').onclick = () => { const nameInput = root.getElementById('exp-name'); const amountInput = root.getElementById('exp-amount'); const name = nameInput.value.trim(); let amount = parseFloat(amountInput.value); if (!name || Number.isNaN(amount) || amount <= 0) return; if (currentType === 'expense') amount = -amount; entries.unshift({ name, amount, date: Date.now() }); nameInput.value = ''; amountInput.value = ''; render(); saveState(entries); }; root.getElementById('btn-reset').onclick = () => { entries = []; render(); saveState(entries); }; getState().then((saved) => { if (Array.isArray(saved)) entries = saved; render(); });
